Bash(cat > /Users/nikita.filatov/Development/ws/cmd/treetest/main.go << 'EOF'
package main

import \(
	"fmt"
	"strings"
	"github.com/nfilatov/ws/internal/tui"
\)

func main\(\) {
	files := []tui.FileEntry{
		{RelPath: "main.go", AbsPath: "/ws/main.go", Exists: true, Status: "M"},
		{RelPath: "internal/git/git.go", AbsPath: "/ws/internal/git/git.go", Exists: true},
		{RelPath: "internal/store/store.go", AbsPath: "/ws/internal/store/store.go", Exists: true, Status: "A"},
		{RelPath: "internal/config/config.go", AbsPath: "/ws/internal/config/config.go", Exists: true},
		{RelPath: "internal/tui/model.go", AbsPath: "/ws/internal/tui/model.go", Exists: true},
		{RelPath: "internal/tui/keys.go", AbsPath: "/ws/internal/tui/keys.go", Exists: true},
		{RelPath: "internal/tui/styles.go", AbsPath: "/ws/internal/tui/styles.go", Exists: true, Status: "?"},
		{RelPath: "internal/tui/tree.go", AbsPath: "/ws/internal/tui/tree.go", Exists: true},
		{RelPath: "Makefile", AbsPath: "/ws/Makefile", Exists: true},
		{RelPath: ".gitignore", AbsPath: "/ws/.gitignore", Exists: false},
	}

	rendered, lineToFileIdx, treeOrder := tui.BuildFileTree\(files, "ws"\)
	fmt.Println\("=== RENDERED TREE ==="\)
	fmt.Println\(rendered\)
	fmt.Println\("=== line map ==="\)
	lines := strings.Split\(rendered, "\\n"\)
	for i, line := range lines {
		idx := -99
		if i < len\(lineToFileIdx\) {
			idx = lineToFileIdx[i]
		}
		name := ""
		if idx >= 0 { name = files[idx].RelPath }
		fmt.Printf\("  line %2d [fileIdx=%3d]: %-40s  %s\\n", i, idx, line, name\)
	}
	fmt.Println\("\\n=== treeOrder ==="\)
	for pos, fileIdx := range treeOrder {
		fmt.Printf\("  cursor %2d → %s\\n", pos, files[fileIdx].RelPath\)
	}
}
EOF
mkdir -p /Users/nikita.filatov/Development/ws/cmd/treetest
mv /Users/nikita.filatov/Development/ws/cmd/treetest/main.go /Users/nikita.filatov/Development/ws/cmd/treetest/main.go
/opt/homebrew/bin/go run /Users/nikita.filatov/Development/ws/cmd/treetest/main.go)
Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/go build -o ws . 2>&1 && PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH make install 2>&1)
